name: Context Compressor
description: Summarize and compress the current task's conversation history to prevent context window overflow during long multi-step tasks. Call this when you notice the task has more than 8 steps and you need to continue. It returns a condensed summary of completed work so far.

task_id.description: The current task ID to compress context for.

preserve_last_n.description: Number of most recent steps to keep verbatim. Default: 3
